hero.title: Your Pet's Health Is Our
hero.subtitle: At Animare Veterinary Clinic, we care for your beloved companions with expert hands and warm hearts. Modern equipment, experienced team, loving approach.

exam.title: General Check-up
exam.desc: Comprehensive health screening and physical examination for early diagnosis.

vaccine.title: Vaccination
vaccine.desc: Complete vaccination programs to protect your pet from diseases.

surgery.title: Surgery
surgery.desc: Safe surgical procedures performed with modern equipment.

dental.title: Dental Care
dental.desc: Tartar cleaning and oral health check-ups.

radiology.title: Radiology
radiology.desc: Digital X-ray and ultrasound for fast and accurate diagnosis.

emergency.title: Emergency Service
emergency.desc: 24/7 emergency veterinary service — we are always here for you.

lab.title: Laboratory
lab.desc: Fast and accurate diagnosis with blood tests, urinalysis, and microbiological tests.

grooming.title: Pet Grooming
grooming.desc: Trimming, bathing, nail clipping, and styling services to keep your pet looking and feeling great.

nutrition.title: Nutrition Consulting
nutrition.desc: Personalised nutrition plans tailored to your pet's age, breed, and health condition.

about.title: Founded with our love
about.text: Founded in 2026, Animare Veterinary Clinic began its journey with the mission of providing the best care to your companions in the heart of Gönyeli / Lefkoşa, North Cyprus (TRNC). Since then, we have helped thousands of pets recover and thrive.
about.text2: With our expert team, modern medical equipment, and loving approach, we make every animal feel special.
about.teamSubtitle: Meet our experienced and passionate team

vet1.name: Dr. Gökay Yeşilovalı
vet1.bio: Specialized in small animal surgery, performing safe and effective procedures with modern surgical techniques.

vet2.name: Dr. Hazel Tamakan Yeşilovalı
vet2.bio: Expert in veterinary microbiology; applies advanced laboratory methods for the diagnosis and treatment of infectious diseases.

about.storyText: Animare was born from a vision that unites veterinary medicine with love for animals. Since our founding, we have followed modern medical technologies while never compromising our understanding of treating each animal as unique. Our clinic offers both medical excellence and a warm environment.

v1.title: Compassion
v1.desc: We handle every animal with the same care as our own pets.

v2.title: Expertise
v2.desc: We serve with continuous education and up-to-date medical knowledge.

v3.title: Transparency
v3.desc: We maintain open communication with owners about treatment processes.
